arts.ttl: Barcelona star to be handed first El Clásico start vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: A member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona is in line for his first-ever start in Spanish football’s biggest fixture on Saturday. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo,…

arts.ttl: Who would Barcelona face if Real Madrid pulled out of Copa del Rey final?
arts.sum: An insight into the path which would be taken in the case of Real Madrid refusing to play tomorrow’s Copa del Rey final has been provided. The info comes courtesy…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid trolled: Celta Vigo announce squad to face Barcelona in CdR final
arts.sum: The social media team at Celta Vigo have on Friday moved to have some fun at the expense of La Liga rivals Real Madrid. This comes amid the ongoing drama…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to play Copa del Rey final despite referee row
arts.sum: Real Madrid confirm participation in Copa del Rey final amid referee dispute. Los Blancos have caused a storm in the last 24 hours following the explosion of their row with the RFEF over the referee choice for the final.

arts.ttl: RFEF president confirms referees for Copa del Rey final won’t be changed amid Real Madrid complaint
arts.sum: RFEF president Rafael Louzan has confirmed there will be no change of referees and that the final in Seville will go ahead as planned. “The CTA [Technical Committee of Referees] has appointed a refereeing team, and that’s the way it is,” said Louzan.

arts.ttl: Pedri vs Jude Bellingham: Who has created more chances since the start of last season?
arts.sum: An altogether interesting statistic surrounding the creative exploits of leading members of the midfield ranks at La Liga rivals Barcelona and Real Madrid has on Friday surfaced online. The players…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid cancel press conference before Copa del Rey final in protest
arts.sum: Real Madrid have continued their war on the refereeing body (CTA) and Royal Spanish Football Federation over officials, and have cancelled their press conference and training session ahead of the Copa del Rey final. Madrid requested a change of officials, feeling that de Burgos Bengoetxea and Gonzalez Fuertes were not in the correct state for the final. RFEF have rejected this request.

arts.ttl: 2 Barcelona, 2 Real Madrid: La Liga’s statistical Team of the Week
arts.sum: Leading players from the first-team squads at both Barcelona and Real Madrid have secured for themselves places in the statistical La Liga Team of the Week. As much was confirmed…

arts.ttl: Copa del Rey final referee breaks down in tears ahead of Barcelona vs Real Madrid: ‘This isn’t fair’
arts.sum: Ricardo de Burgos Bengoetxea, the referee assigned to this weekend’s Copa del Rey final, could not help but allow his emotions to show during an appearance in front of the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Real Madrid: Los Blancos receive triple injury boost for El Clasico
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti names Kylian Mbappe, David Alaba and Ferland Mendy in his squad for Saturday's Copa del Rey final against Barcelona.
